title: Multiplayer Freecam
description: A datapack that allows the freecam feature, working in multiplayer with very special features!
body:
A datapack that allows the freecam feature, working in multiplayer with very special features!

**By pressing 'G' you can switch between modes. Works in creative, survival and adventure modes! While in freecam mode, a mannequin (npc) takes your place. **

If your mannequin is damaged while you are in freee cam mode, you get switched back. But be careful, you could still be killed!

**There is a fixed limit of distance you can move from your mannequin of 50 blocks**. The distance is fixed in code, but if you really want to change it or remove it, you can by modifying the datapack. If you open the directory: "freecam/data/freecam/function/freecam/distance" there will be a file called "start_check.mcfunction". In there, the only line "$execute as @p[nbt={UUID:$(id)}] if entity @s[distance=50..] facing entity @s eyes run tp ^ ^ ^45" defined the max distance to move and how far you get teleported when exceeding it. By modifying the 50 in "distance=50.." you can change the max distance, and by modifying the 45 in "tp ^ ^ ^45" you can change how close to the mannequin you teleport.

Thanks for trying the datapack and contact me for any issues.
